code_usability.detail: No code generated; Category 1 evidence mapping only

functional_suitability.note: Description is brief; does not differentiate from medical-research-gap-finder clearly enough — users may not know when to use mapper vs gap-finder

reliability.note: No live retrieval requirement reduces reliability inconsistency; however, evidence density claims rely on training knowledge without explicit caveat

agent_usability.note: Core function section is compact but the 'behave like' language is informal for agent instructions

agent_specific.note: Entry-point suggestion without overstating as formal gap is an important discipline; downstream routing present

inputs.label: Map evidence landscape for immunotherapy response in triple-negative breast cancer

assertions.text: Field organized by major research streams rather than individual papers
Dense/crowded areas distinguished from thin areas
Thin areas not labeled as high-value formal gaps
Entry-point suggestions provided without overstating as validated recommendations
Downstream routing recommendation given (next best skill)
Population, endpoint, and method map dimensions all present
Evidence density and saturation section present
Topic scope defined before mapping begins
Evidence density not equated with certainty
No formal gap claims made without separate gap analysis step

inputs.label: Overly broad topic requiring scope narrowing before mapping

assertions.text: Topic too broad identified and narrowed before mapping
Map organized around narrowed scope, not original broad topic
Evidence density claims appropriately caveated as based on training knowledge
assertions.note: Evidence density claims for the narrowed topic presented without caveat that they are based on training knowledge rather than live retrieval

assertions.text: Entry point suggestions conservative for narrowed scope

key_strengths: Entry-point suggestions without overstating as formal gaps is an important and rare discipline that prevents premature study commitment
Clear differentiation from gap-finding within the skill itself (hard rule #1) prevents scope creep
Downstream routing standard ensures this skill functions as an effective upstream entry in the research workflow
Nine-dimension mapping frame (streams, populations, endpoints, methods, density, thin areas, entry points) provides structured evidence organization

recommendations.title: Evidence density claims not consistently caveated as training-knowledge based
recommendations.problem: When mapping evidence density (dense/thin/moderate areas), claims are sometimes presented without noting they are based on training knowledge rather than live retrieval.
recommendations.root_cause: Unlike medical-research-gap-finder which mandates live retrieval, topic-evidence-mapper relies on training knowledge but does not consistently require this to be disclosed.
recommendations.fix: Add a hard rule: 'All evidence density and stream coverage claims must include a brief caveat: [Based on training knowledge — verify with current literature search for accurate density assessment].'

recommendations.title: Description does not clearly differentiate from medical-research-gap-finder
recommendations.problem: The description and sample triggers overlap significantly with medical-research-gap-finder, making it unclear when to use one vs the other.
recommendations.root_cause: Description focuses on what the skill does (map evidence landscape) but not on the key distinction: this skill maps BEFORE formal gap analysis, while the gap finder performs the gap analysis.
recommendations.fix: Add to description: 'Use this skill BEFORE medical-research-gap-finder — it provides the evidence landscape that makes gap analysis more rigorous. Do not use for formal gap identification or study planning directly.'

recommendations.title: Core Function section uses informal 'behave like' language
recommendations.problem: The 'This skill should not: behave like a full literature review writer, behave like a formal gap-finder...' language is informal and may not provide precise enough guidance for agent execution.
recommendations.root_cause: Core Function section written in conversational style.
recommendations.fix: Replace 'behave like' language with specific operational prohibitions: 'Do not produce prose narrative summaries of papers. Do not label thin areas as formal research gaps. Do not recommend study designs.' etc.
